title: chloraea fonkii
intro: Chloraea fonkii, also known as the New Zealand orchid or Fonk's orchid, is a species of flowering orchid native to New Zealand. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis, and its anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Chloraea fonkii include its potential to alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve overall respiratory function. The herbal preparations of Chloraea fonkii include infusions, tinctures, and teas, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
